CHART69
In this nativity Saturn and
Jupiter are in the same house, with
Mars
Mars in the 7th to them. Saturn and
Mars are enemies, hence the father
will not live long. The Moon has Dt.
Yen.
Jupiter at the back, and Ketu and
Venus in front. This portends short Moon Dh.
life for mother also. Saturn and Jupiter
Jupt
are conjunct with the Sun, the next
Sun Mer.
sign is occupied by the Moon and
Sat.
the third by Ketu and Venus. This
indicates possession' ofbeauty products and study ofAtharvana Veda. The
native's father will have 2 wives as female planets occupy the succeeding
house. Since the Moon is succeeded by Venus and Ketu in the next house, the
first wife ofthe father will pass away. He will then remarry. This will bring
him prosperity .
